fields.title: Land Encroachment Alerts
fields.description: Built an end-to-end geospatial AI pipeline that watches Bangalore's urban green zones and land boundaries from space using Sentinel-2 satellite imagery. Automatically flagging encroachment and sending alert reports without any manual intervention.
fields.tech_stack: Python, Sentinel-2, NDVI, NDBI, Rasterio, GeoPandas

fields.title: Intelligent Geospatial Chatbot
fields.description: Built an intelligent geospatial chatbot capable of answering GIS-based queries, extracting spatial insights, and assisting with GIS workflows using NLP and LLM models. Integrates spatial data retrieval with conversational AI to deliver context-aware geospatial analysis.
fields.tech_stack: Python, LangChain, LLM, GeoPandas, PostGIS, FAISS, NLP, FastAPI

fields.title: Raster-Based Terrain Deviation Analysis Tool
fields.description: Built a Python-based raster analysis tool in ArcGIS Pro to automate terrain comparison and generate precise elevation deviation maps from DEM data. Streamlined workflows for cut-fill analysis and large-scale terrain monitoring, improving efficiency and accuracy. Published results on ArcGIS Online for interactive visualization and decision support.
fields.tech_stack: Python, ArcGIS Pro, ArcPy, DEM, Raster Analysis, ArcGIS Online

fields.title: LiDAR SLAM Framework
fields.description: Developed a modified ICP algorithm with feature extraction to enhance LiDAR SLAM accuracy in GNSS-denied environments using Velodyne VLP-16/32 sensors.
